title: Yeah!
why_this_song: Yeah! by Usher (2004) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 7 times; first heard in: "Let's go!"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Usher (Usher, Usher, Usher, Usher)"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "She know how it feels (hey!)"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "She had me feeling like she's ready to blow (watch out!)"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "Up in the club with my homies"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah!
Yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah!
Up in the club with my homies
Shawty got down low, she said, "Come and get me" (yeah! Yeah!)
I got so caught up, I forgot she told me (yeah! Yeah!)
Her and my girl, they used to be the best of homies (yeah! Yeah!)

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "let's" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "let's" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "usher" in the whole song?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:

excerpts.text: She's saying, "Come get me" (come get me)

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Yeah!" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Yeah!" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
